name: DiffDock
description: Protein-ligand docking with DiffDock-L model, without known binding site (blind docking). State of the art diffusion based model. Poses will automatically be scored with Autodock Vina afterwards.
capabilities: Protein-ligand docking with DiffDock-L model, without known binding site (blind docking)
State of the art diffusion based model
Poses will automatically be scored with Autodock Vina afterwards

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

n_poses.description: Number of docking poses to generate
